title: CB Tucks In Behind Wide Press
description: You are the left centre-back. The right back steps out to press wide; adjust your position to protect the inside lane.
teaching_point: Slide centrally and slightly deeper than the pressing fullback to protect the direct channel to goal.

feedback_hints.success: You provided help-side cover and removed the direct central threat.
feedback_hints.common_error: You stayed too wide, leaving a gap between centre-back and fullback.
feedback_hints.teaching_emphasis: Your first job is to protect the central lane while the wide duel happens.
success_points: You moved into a goal-side cover lane behind the first press.
Your position could intercept or delay an inside pass.
error_points: Remaining wide left the half-space lane open.
Your depth did not support the pressing fullback if beaten.
alternate_points: A slightly higher position can still work if midfield screen support is nearby.
